title: Prima Laundry 2 Fold Dryer Airer Rack Washing Home Garment Clothes Stand, Alloy Steel, White, 4 Metre
features: Versatile Indoor and Outdoor Use: Perfect for drying clothes both indoors and outdoors, offering flexibility no matter the weather.
Compact and Foldable Design: Folds down to just 51 cm (W) x 110 cm (H) for easy storage, making it ideal for homes with limited space.
Generous Drying Space: Provides 4 metres of drying space, accommodating multiple garments, towels, or linens at once.
Durable White Coated Finish: Features a sleek white coated finish that is non-toxic and safe for all fabrics, ensuring long-lasting use and a clean appearance.
Easy Setup and Storage: Quickly extends to 101 cm (W) x 110 cm (H) when in use and folds away just as easily, simplifying your laundry routine.
description: Introducing our 2-Fold Indoor and Outdoor Folding Clothes Airer, the ultimate drying solution for your laundry needs. Designed for both indoor and outdoor use, this airer combines convenience, durability, and ample drying space in one compact unit. Whether you need a reliable drying rack for your home or a portable solution for travel, our 2-Fold Indoor and Outdoor Folding Clothes Airer is the perfect choice. Enjoy the benefits of air drying your clothes, saving energy, and maintaining the quality of your fabrics. Order yours today and experience the convenience and efficiency of this versatile clothes airer!
